items.headline: Albemarle (ALB) Wins Analyst Upgrades As Lithium Expansion Story Gains Support
items.snippet: Analyst support centered on expansion and productivity suggests that Albemarle execution on projects and cost discipline will be important areas to watch. Citi and RBC highlighting expansion and productivity improvements.

items.headline: Energy storage demand grows 40% annually, lithium producers bet on growth drivers beyond electric vehicles
items.snippet: Grid energy storage is more evenly distributed globally, which is a very interesting demand driver said Eric Norris Chief Commercial Officer of Albemarle.

items.headline: Albemarle Likely to Continue Growing Volumes Over the Coming Years, RBC Says
items.snippet: RBC stated it now expects 2026 and 2027 EBITDA of $2.8 billion and $2.9 billion respectively. Lithium supply is expected to remain tight through 2027.
